name: sub_delegation_denied
description: Depth-2 chain where the intermediate does NOT hold identity:delegate. Sub-delegation is a separately-granted privilege (SPEC §9.1) and its absence must cause the verifier to reject the chain with status invalid and reason delegation_not_authorized.

verify_result.error_reason: delegation_not_authorized: cert 0 issued by a subject whose parent cert 1 did not grant "identity:delegate"
